title: Connectivity of generating graphs of nilpotent groups
abstract:
Let
                    
                      G
                    
                    be
                    
                      2
                    
                    -generated group. The generating graph
                    
                      
                        Γ
                        (
                        G
                        )
                      
                    
                    is the graph whose vertices are the elements of
                    
                      G
                    
                    and where two vertices
                    
                      g
                    
                    and
                    
                      h
                    
                    are adjacent if
                    
                      
                        G
                        =
                        〈
                        g
                        ,
                        h
                        〉
                      
                    
                    . This graph encodes the combinatorial structure of the distribution of generating pairs across
                    
                      G
                    
                    . In this paper we study several natural graph theoretic properties related to the connectedness of
                    
                      
                        Γ
                        (
                        G
                        )
                      
                    
                    in the case where
                    
                      G
                    
                    is a finite nilpotent group. For example, we prove that if
                    
                      G
                    
                    is nilpotent, then the graph obtained from
                    
                      
                        Γ
                        (
                        G
                        )
                      
                    
                    by removing its isolated vertices is maximally connected and, if
                    
                      
                        |
                        G
                        |
                        ⩾
                        3
                      
                    
                    , also Hamiltonian. We pose several questions.
